title: Rubio to meet with Congress as Iran ceasefire falters
summary_full: The secretary of state will testify publicly for the first time since the war began, as the regional conflict worsens and lawmaker patience runs thin.
summary_public: The secretary of state will testify publicly for the first time since the war began, as the regional conflict worsens and lawmaker patience runs thin.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran ceasefire falters... regional conflict worsens
